name: ~Very Bad Kings~ Haikyuu Edition
description:
Contentwarning: Reverse-Harem, Bully-Romance, Dark-Romance

Based on the "Very Bad Kings" Novels

~~~~~~~~~~

You get invited to the famous Elite-College Karasuno. You've earned to attend at the College with a Scholarship, not knowing that the Life there will be a hard on. Four Boys, Kōshi Sugawara, Daichi Sawamura, Tooru Oikawa and Atsumu Miya, the so called "Kings" already have their Eyes on you ready to hunt down their new Prey. You. They want to break you, both in Mind and with your Body. Will you give in to the Pleasure, Lust, Desire and hot Sex the four Boys offer you?
creator: xElindrax
